scope: code-abyss repo-level distribution and skill-system maturity
verdict: Directionally correct for the repo-level distributed product; incomplete because the stronger 33-skill personal-skill-system exists but is not yet the distributed source of truth.

confirmed_findings.claim: Root skills tree has only 21 SKILL.md files.
confirmed_findings.impact: Root distribution is incomplete compared with the portable skill system.

confirmed_findings.claim: personal-skill-system has a fuller skill tree.
confirmed_findings.impact: The stronger system exists but is not yet the root distribution truth.

confirmed_findings.claim: Workflows, guards, full router, and verify-skill-system are missing from root skills.
confirmed_findings.impact: The shipped root skill surface lacks orchestration and safety gates.

evidence: manifest hosts include claude and codex only
confirmed_findings.impact: Pack single-source host policy is incomplete.

evidence: package.json still references a stale 56-skill claim
confirmed_findings.impact: Distribution docs and metadata can mislead users.

confirmed_findings.claim: install.js is still too large and mixes responsibilities.
confirmed_findings.impact: Installer maintainability and unit-testability remain weak.

corrected_findings.claim: The project has no mature skill system.
evidence: personal-skill-system verifies 33 skills, 99 capability modules, and 32 routes
corrected_findings.impact: The real issue is source-of-truth and distribution alignment, not total absence of maturity.

corrected_findings.claim: The 32 installed skills are the only real system.
evidence: local current portable system has 33 skills
corrected_findings.impact: Counts must be refreshed before being used as release claims.

notes: This is a model review record, not a benchmark run.
All confirmed findings must still be implemented through task cards.
